title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Titan Eyeplus Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Titan Eyeplus Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Titan Eyeplus Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About Titan Eyeplus Global Group:
Titan Eyeplus Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus Global Group!
